text.title: Agency Cash-Flow Friday Routine Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping artefact state to a rule.

decision-tree.root-question: Did the routine complete within 15 minutes?

conclusion.verdict: trim checks or pre-export to fit 15 min

branch.when: time_over == false AND items_missing == false AND amber_no_action == true

conclusion.verdict: add named action before closing routine

branch.when: time_over == false AND items_missing == false AND amber_no_action == false AND ledger_missing == true
time_over == false AND items_missing == false AND amber_no_action == false AND ledger_missing == false AND runway_critical == true
time_over == false AND items_missing == false AND amber_no_action == false AND ledger_missing == false AND runway_critical == false

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: time_over=false, items_missing=false, amber_no_action=false, ledger_missing=false, runway_critical=false → accept routine.
